Class DataLoader

java.lang.Object
classes.DataLoader
All Implemented Interfaces:
DataManager
public class DataLoader extends Object implements DataManager
DataLoader class responsible for loading and saving data related to Applicants, Applications, and Officers from CSV files. This class implements the DataManager interface and provides functionality to read from and write to external storage.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Hashir
